title: Plan of Action and Milestones Open Items Past Due

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase 2686) or CSV lookup updated by GRC
spl:
| inputlookup poam_open.csv
| eval due_epoch=strptime(due_date,"%Y-%m-%d")
| where due_epoch < now() AND status!="Closed"
| table poam_id, control, owner, due_date, status, risk_rating
| sort due_date
value: Lists overdue POA&M items for CA-5 plans of action and milestones.
implementation: (1) Automate CSV refresh from authoritative GRC; (2) RBAC the lookup; (3) weekly leadership digest; (4) integrate CAP tracking.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
